title: cochemiea fraileana
intro: Cochemiea fraileana, also known as the night-blooming cereus or queen of the night, is a species of cactus that produces fragrant flowers only at night, typically in the summer months. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Cochemiea fraileana include reducing inflammation and pain, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune system function. Herbal preparations of Cochemiea fraileana may include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
